# Test data
Most of the files in this directory are read by tests to provide input values
and/or "golden" outputs for validating components of Concentrate. For some such
files, there are matching equivalent human-readable source files.

## JSON
`.json` files contain JSON-encoded data.


## Protobuf
`.pb` files contain wire-format (binary-encoded) [protobuf][protobuf] data. The
corresponding `.txtpb` files encode the same data in the human-readable
[protobuf text format][txtpb-spec].

Files in either format may be automatically derived from the other with
[`protoc`][protoc] as in the following examples:

```
# "Encode": Convert from .txtpb to .pb
protoc --proto_path=../../src gtfs-realtime.proto \
  --encode=transit_realtime.FeedMessage  \
  < vehiclepositions.txtpb \
  > vehiclepositions.pb
```

```
# "Decode": Convert from .pb to .txtpb
protoc --proto_path=../../src gtfs-realtime.proto \
  --decode=transit_realtime.FeedMessage  \
  < vehiclepositions.pb \
  > vehiclepositions.txtpb
```

Some of the `.pb` files were originally sampled from production data, rather
than being generated by hand-written `.txtpb`. In this case, encoding the
`.txtpb` may not generate a byte-for-byte identical `.pb` file; however, the
generated file contains equivalent proto data, as can be verified by
round-tripping back to `.txtpb`.

[protobuf]: https://protobuf.dev
[txtpb-spec]: https://protobuf.dev/reference/protobuf/textformat-spec
[protoc]: https://protobuf.dev/installation
